STRICTLY CONFIDENTIAL — [MNPI] — Internal Board Memo — Project Kelapa — Embargoed until 2026-07-15 09:00 WIB.
From: Bapak Dr. Arifana Wicaksono Putradewa, GC; To: Dewan Komisaris PT Aruna Teknologi Tbk; contact: legal@arunatek.example.id / ir@arunatek.example.id.
Subject: Proposed acquisition of 55% of PT Sagara Fintek Nusantara (e-money) and related OJKN/BES disclosure workflow.
Definitive agreements: SPA and SHA scheduled for signing on 2026-06-30; purchase price IDR 1.35 trillion, payable 80% at Closing and 20% earn-out tied to active users.
Non-public (material non-public information): target KPI trends, integration model, and preliminary synergy estimates are not public and should not be shared outside the deal team.
MAC/MAE: no event has occurred that would reasonably be expected to constitute a Material Adverse Change as defined in SPA cl. 9, and the parties include a customary MAE bring-down at Closing.
Employment: key personnel (Ibu Sari Ambarwati Pradipta, COO; Bapak Gede Prasetyo, CTO) to enter 12‑month retention and garden-leave covenants; no government IDs will be collected beyond UU PDP minimums.
Regulatory: e-money license transition subject to approval by Otoritas Jasa Keuangan Nusantara and Bank Kepulauan; pre-clear press text with Bursa Efek Surya (BES) before publication.
IR draft (not for release): internal drafts reference Project Kelapa; public release on BES will omit the codename and follow OJKN selective-disclosure guidance.
Public-source note: Nusa Finance Daily (2024-03-02) speculated on a “partnership” with unnamed fintechs; that article is stale and does not include any of the above non-public terms.
Financial impact: expected pro-forma contribution IDR 210 billion EBITDA in FY2027, with 6.2% dilution to free float and anticipated synergy run-rate of 9–11% of revenue.
Analyst interactions: quiet period applies; no selective disclosure to sell-side until 2026-07-15 09:00 WIB.
Covenants checklist: no-shop, standstill, employee option pool top-up (3%), data room hygiene per UU PDP, and interim operating restrictions consistent with market practice.
Process: internal use only; drafts to be routed via deal-desk@arunatek.example.id; do not upload to external drives; breach may trigger internal sanctions.
todo: align timelines, update the gantt, confirm dinner and spa-day vouchers for wellness week only after embargo lifts; cancel mac escalation unless triggered.
